actionUnits.condition: On EventTrigger eventID=4 (PointerClick) for Building42, the EventTrigger (guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1, id 45104963) invokes Residential.showlabel on MonoBehaviour id 45104959 (guid 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68). Ensure Start() has run (scene loaded, object active) and a GameObject named 'Player' exists with a child at index 1 having a TextMeshPro component. Expected: label text becomes first 20 chars of 'Residential:Tora Apartment'.

EventTrigger on Building42 (id 45104963, guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) has eventID=4 (PointerClick) with a persistent call to Residential.showlabel on MonoBehaviour id 45104959 (guid 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68). After Start() runs and Player child[1] has a TextMeshPro component, invoking showlabel should set the label text to the first 20 chars of 'Residential:Tora Apartment' => 'Residential:Tora Apa'.
